title: Add tool-context URL prefetch for council queries
description: Give LLM Council built-in retrieval context for URL-heavy queries across web app, API, and MCP: detect URLs, safely fetch public text/HTML resources, inject bounded source excerpts into Stage 1 prompt, and expose metadata. Follow Beads→OpenSpec→TDD→Implement→Deploy→Forgejo.
close_reason: Implemented Stage 0 tool-context URL prefetch across API, web app conversation endpoints, and MCP; added TDD coverage and verification.

title: Fix New Conversation button - auth header missing
description: Frontend api.js doesn't send X-Council-Key header, causing 401 on all API calls. Fix: Add Tailscale IP whitelist to backend auth + read VITE_COUNCIL_API_KEY in frontend.
close_reason: Fixed frontend API auth headers, added Tailscale auth bypass, and verified New Conversation API path.

title: Write API endpoint tests
description: FastAPI endpoint tests with mocked council. Test /api/council with compact flag, /health, /api/info.
close_reason: Completed: 26 API endpoint tests covering /health, /api/info, /api/council with compact, final_only, markdown formats, auth disabled via fixture

title: Benchmark-gated July 2026 council roster refresh
description: Refresh the LLM Council after July 2026 model audit: benchmark MiniMax M3 vs Llama 4 Maverick, Kimi K2.7 Code vs Kimi K2.6, Fireworks GLM xHigh vs z-ai GLM 5.2, include restored Fable 5 as challenger-only, update Sonnet alias to Claude Sonnet 5, then land only benchmark-supported swaps.

title: Upgrade council Opus 4.7 to 4.8 (chairman+evaluator)
description: Upgrade Claude Opus 4.7 -> 4.8 across backend config, anthropic client map, OpenRouter fallback, aliases, evaluator priority, tiered truncation, reasoning effort (validated xhigh works on 4.8), MCP/web text, tests, docs. Keep 4.7/4.6 backward-compat entries. Recipe: Beads->OpenSpec->TDD->Implement->Deploy->Forgejo.
close_reason: Opus 4.8 upgrade implemented, tested (114 pass), deployed to Cloud Run (chairman=claude-opus-4.8 verified), xhigh validated working.

title: Add streaming support for council responses
description: Implement SSE streaming for /api/council endpoint. Stream individual model responses as they complete, then stream chairman synthesis. Makes the UI more responsive for long deliberations.
close_reason: Implemented SSE streaming: /api/council/stream endpoint, stream_council() generator, MCP server SSE consumer with progress logging and sync fallback. Tested locally (5/5, 18s) and on Cloud Run (5/5, 6-72s). Deployed.

title: Investigate GPT-5.5 xhigh empty-content benchmark row
description: The 2026-06-20 live benchmark recorded one empty_content result for GPT-5.5 xhigh on debugging-async-001 even with max_tokens=4096. Investigate whether OpenRouter/GPT xhigh needs a larger max token cap, a different response field, or should remain a blocked/limited variant for certain prompt classes.
close_reason: Investigated and fixed diagnostics: 4096 xhigh empty content reproduced as reasoning-token budget exhaustion (finish_reason=length, native=max_output_tokens, reasoning_tokens=4096); 8192 produced visible output after 6732 reasoning tokens. Added future benchmark finish/reasoning diagnostics.

title: Write unit tests for config module
description: Test resolve_model_alias, get_model_reasoning_effort, calculate_max_response_chars, tiered truncation, evaluator priority list.
close_reason: Completed: 37 config tests covering aliases, reasoning effort, Fireworks IDs, evaluator priority, tiered truncation, model aliases completeness

title: Write unit tests for evaluator selection and curation
description: Test get_evaluator_models with self-exclusion, select_top_responses with wildcard+diversity, randomized order per evaluator, parse_ranking_from_text with Hypothesis fuzzing.
close_reason: Completed: 22 council unit tests covering evaluator selection, self-exclusion, randomized order, top+wildcard+diversity curation, ranking parser with Hypothesis fuzzing, truncation with code block preservation

title: Complete Cloud Build GitHub trigger setup
description: Cloud Build connection 'llm-council-github' created but PENDING_USER_OAUTH. Need to: 1) Open the authorization link in a browser to connect GitHub, 2) Create the trigger: gcloud builds triggers create github --name=llm-council-deploy --region=us-central1 --repo-name=llm-council --repo-owner=ShreeMulay --branch-pattern='^master$' --build-config=cloudbuild.yaml --project=tke-phi-privacy-engine. Auth link: https://console.cloud.google.com/cloud-build/triggers;region=us-central1?project=tke-phi-privacy-engine
close_reason: Replaced Cloud Build GitHub trigger with GitHub Actions + Workload Identity Federation. Created .github/workflows/deploy.yml and scripts/deploy.sh. WIF pool, provider, and service account all configured.

title: Write integration tests for 9-model flow
description: Mock all 9 providers with respx. Full 3-stage flow: 9 collect -> 3 evaluate -> 5 curated -> chairman. Test compact mode, final_only mode, partial failure, evaluator failure, malformed output.
close_reason: Completed: 7 integration tests for 9-model 3-stage flow with mocked providers. Tests cover full flow, compact mode, final_only, partial failure resilience, self-exclusion, caching, and curated chairman input.

title: Prevent Woodpecker quality gates on pages branch
description: CI quality gates were added for PR/branch pushes, but the Pages deploy step pushes the generated pages branch. Exclude pages branch from source quality gates to avoid running project tests against generated static site content.
close_reason: Excluded generated pages branch from source quality gates

title: Add conversation export (markdown, JSON)
description: Export council conversations to markdown or JSON format. Useful for documentation, sharing, or archiving deliberation results.
close_reason: Completed: /api/council/export POST endpoint (markdown/JSON download), ?format= query param on /api/council, auto-generated filenames, AGENTS.md updated. Deployed via GitHub Actions.

title: Add internal model benchmark harness
description: Build a PHI-free benchmark harness to compare Fireworks GLM-5.2, GPT-5.5 medium/high/xhigh, and Opus 4.8 max on side-by-side outputs, automated judge scores, latency, token usage, and estimated cost. Store durable Forgejo-reviewable benchmark artifacts under benchmarks/runs/.
close_reason: Merged Forgejo PR #5 with live benchmark artifacts; follow-up llm-council-76d tracks remaining GPT-5.5 xhigh empty-content anomaly.

title: Add per-conversation model selection with global defaults
description: Implement full model selection: global default config (localStorage), per-conversation active_models, per-message override via input bar gear icon. Support all 9 models with presets (Full/Compact/Speed/Minimal).
close_reason: Implemented global, per-conversation, and per-message model selection with tests.

title: Add real independent benchmark judge pass
description: Run a real independent, non-candidate judge over the saved 2026-06-20 model benchmark raw outputs. Persist blind judge scores and a conclusion summary as Forgejo-reviewable artifacts, with no PHI/secrets and no silent provider fallback.
close_reason: Merged Forgejo PR #6 with real Gemini independent judge artifacts: 10 prompts judged, 50/50 score rows, zero provider/parse errors.

title: Deploy 9-model council to Cloud Run and verify
description: Deploy the updated backend to Cloud Run. Verify health endpoint returns 9 models. Run live council query with all 9 models. Update MCP server if needed.
close_reason: Completed: Deployed to Cloud Run, health endpoint returns all 9 models, live compact council query verified (5 models, 5.0s, final_only mode)

title: Add designer role with Gemini 3.5 Flash to LLM Council
description: Integrate Gemini 3.5 Flash as the designated designer model in the LLM Council. Update config, council routing, MCP server, tests, and documentation.
close_reason: Designer role work was explicitly reverted per user request; no designer setup wanted in llm-council.

title: Push GitHub Actions workflow file
description: The .github/workflows/deploy.yml file is committed locally but can't be pushed because the GitHub OAuth token lacks 'workflow' scope. Either: 1) Run 'gh auth refresh -h github.com -s workflow' interactively to add the scope, then 'git push', or 2) Create a Personal Access Token with 'repo' + 'workflow' scopes.
close_reason: Completed: deploy.yml pushed to origin/master via SSH in commit bfb9baa

title: Fix stuck streaming UI during council deliberation
description: User ran a full-council query with video/transcript URLs and frontend shows all stages loading indefinitely. Diagnose whether backend stream is hung, SSE events are malformed, or frontend loading state is not cleared; add tests and fix.
close_reason: Fixed stuck streaming UI: robust SSE frame buffering for large complete events and refresh current conversation on stream completion.

title: Refresh LLM Council GLM and Qwen roster
description: Upgrade stale council model slots after live roster review: replace GLM 5.1 with GLM 5.2 where available, replace Qwen 3.5 122B with Qwen 3.7 Max, keep Opus 4.8 chairman, and document/evaluate Claude Fable 5 as a challenger rather than production chairman.
close_reason: Roster refresh implemented, deployed, and smoke tested

title: Add Fireworks GLM 5.2 xHigh challenger
description: Add explicit Fireworks-direct GLM 5.2 challenger alias glm-fw with xHigh reasoning, streaming support beyond the 4096 non-streaming cap, OpenRouter fallback to z-ai/glm-5.2, refreshed sonnet/flash aliases, TDD coverage, A/B smoke/benchmark, Cloud Run deploy, Forgejo PR/CI/merge, GitHub mirror, and memory. Scope is llm-council only.
close_reason: Implemented Fireworks GLM 5.2 xHigh challenger via glm-fw, streaming >4096, xHigh reasoning pass-through, fallback, alias refresh, tests, Cloud Run deploy, Forgejo PR #8 merge, and GitHub mirror.

title: Add /council slash command integration
description: Create a skill file for OpenCode that invokes the MCP tool with /council command. Should support: /council <query>, /council --fast <query> (final_only), /council --models opus,gemini <query>
close_reason: Completed: /council slash command is implemented at ~/.config/opencode/command/council/

title: Add pytest infrastructure and test dependencies
description: Add pytest, pytest-asyncio, pytest-cov, respx, hypothesis to pyproject.toml. Create tests/ directory structure.
close_reason: Completed: pytest infrastructure added to pyproject.toml, tests/ directory created with __init__.py
